description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of the MAC-10. The main body is rectangular with a flat top and features a prominent charging handle on the upper surface. The grip is vertical and robust, with a detachable box magazine inserted from the bottom. The barrel is short and protrudes slightly from the front, while the rear includes a simple iron sight and a mounting point for a sling or attachment. The surface is matte gray, with visible fasteners and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form.
description: A compact, boxy submachine gun with a short barrel, vertical grip, and detachable magazine, finished in matte gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular body, vertical grip, and magazine, with the charging handle and rear sight visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, muzzle, and the symmetrical, flat-topped upper receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same boxy body, grip, and magazine, with additional detail on the ejection port and fasteners.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
